posts.author: CharlotteB (Charlotte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature Request:

To have the option of selecting NO colour (color) as sometimes a label status has to be used as there is no technical alternative, and having to select a colour (color) means that it automatically visually makes it look like it is a status related update.
